tool_input.command:
for filepath in \
  /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-transaction.json \
  /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json; do
  relpath="${filepath#/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/}"
  jq -r --arg file "$relpath" \
    '.sections[] | "\(.id)\t\(.title)"' \
    "$filepath" 2>/dev/null
  echo "---"
done
tool_input.description: List sections of transaction and database knowledge files
Read sections about independent transaction execution
